perf_hint: every live burst reads `burst_size` particles at every pixel it covers, so frame time scales with `burst_size` times the number of bursts still in the air (`lifetime`) — on software rendering keep `burst_size` at 48 or below, or shorten `lifetime`, and preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: burst_size
params.description: How many particles a single hit throws.

params.name: lifetime
params.description: How long a particle burns, in seconds, before it goes out.

params.name: speed
params.description: How hard a hit throws its particles.

params.name: gravity
params.description: How fast a burst falls; negative makes it rise.

params.name: drag
params.description: How quickly a particle loses the speed it was thrown with.

params.name: size
params.description: How wide a particle's lit core is, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: glow
params.description: How far the halo around each particle reaches into the frame.

params.name: sparkle
params.description: How brightly the highs twinkle the particles still in the air.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the bursts.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: spread
params.description: How far a burst is thrown from the middle of the frame.
